prompt_text: Compare Nudge Security and Zluri for discover all SaaS apps used across your company without deploying agents
response:
# Nudge Security vs Zluri: Agentless SaaS Discovery

## Quick Comparison

| Feature | Nudge Security | Zluri |
|---------|---|---|
| **Agent-Free Discovery** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **Primary Method** | Email metadata, network traffic | Email metadata, network logs |
| **Implementation Speed** | Fast (hours) | Fast (hours) |
| **Setup Complexity** | Low | Low-Medium |

---

## Nudge Security

**Strengths:**
- **Simplest deployment** - Email integration only (no network access required)
- **Fast results** - Discovers apps within hours
- **Focus on security** - Emphasizes cloud threat detection alongside discovery
- **Email-centric** - Effective for identifying collaboration and productivity tools
- **Lower friction** - Minimal IT infrastructure changes needed

**Limitations:**
- May miss apps not accessed via email
- Less visibility into non-email-based application usage
- Smaller feature set beyond discovery

---

## Zluri

**Strengths:**
- **Comprehensive discovery** - Combines email metadata + network logs + DNS data
- **Richer insights** - Provides app usage patterns, user activity, cost analysis
- **Lifecycle management** - Goes beyond discovery to app onboarding/offboarding
- **Better cost visibility** - Includes SaaS spend management features
- **More complete picture** - Captures apps used outside email flows

**Limitations:**
- More complex setup (network integration required)
- Longer implementation timeline
- Higher learning curve
- May require more IT involvement

---

## When to Choose Each

**Choose Nudge Security if:**
- You need fastest time-to-value
- Your focus is security + basic discovery
- You want minimal IT setup
- Budget is constrained

**Choose Zluri if:**
- You want comprehensive discovery + management
- You need SaaS cost optimization
- You're building a full SaaS governance program
- You need detailed usage analytics

---

## Bottom Line

Both are **genuinely agentless**. Nudge is faster/simpler; Zluri is more comprehensive. For pure discovery speed, **Nudge wins**. For overall SaaS program management, **Zluri offers more value**.
